findings: Features Bwd Packet Length Mean and Avg Bwd Segment Size are perfectly correlated yet both rank top individually, confirming redundancy versus importance tension.
Dependency contextualization shows these features cluster tightly in strong correlation pairs, indicating concentrated dependency profiles.
The presence of perfect or near-perfect correlations in the feature cluster supports structural redundancy despite apparent individual importance.
contradictions: Local contradiction preserved: top-ranked features are also perfectly correlated, challenging straightforward importance interpretation.
limitations: No direct perturbation-based importance recalculations were performed; conclusions rely on dependency profiling only.
